content:
I have an interview scheduled for a frontend position at a small tech company. Probably more of a screening call but its with the head of product. The job description mentions rigor, attention to detail and while reviewing the company on their website, I found quite a few layout issues. I have figured out some fixes for them and was thinking of bringing this up during the call to stand out but realize it could go wrong.
Has anybody done this before? If you were hiring and someone brought this up how would you feel?

  submitted by   /u/wiseduckling
[link]   [comments]
